results.name: eyestalk
results.description: Eyes on stalks! See also [spy eyestalk](/tags/artwork/spy-eyestalk) for the machine variety.

results.name: eyes where they shouldn't be
results.description: Eyes on hands, Eyes on swords, Eyes everywhere, if an eye is anywhere it normally wouldn't be, this is the tag for it.

results.name: eye (symbol)
results.description: Eyes in symbolic or illustrated form.

results.name: ezio auditore da firenze
results.description: Italian Assassin from the Assassin's Creed series. Main character of Assassin's Creed 2, Brotherhood and Revelations.

results.name: ezuri (phyrexian)
results.description: Ezuri, compleated.

results.name: face
results.description: Depicts a personified face composed on a foreign medium

results.name: face-commander
results.description: A card that is the primary, marquee legendary creature featured on the packaging of a pre-constructed Commander deck. It sets the main mechanical theme and color identity of the deck.

results.name: face decoration
results.description: Things decorated with an image of a face.

results.name: faceless
results.description: Things that don't have faces but otherwise usually might.

results.name: facial piercing
results.description: Nose, mouth, tongue, or eyebrow piercings

results.name: facing away
results.description: Creatures looking toward the back of the piece, not toward us.

results.name: fact or fiction
results.description: Pile/dilemma based card advantage. An opponent is involved in choosing or making the piles.

results.name: fake flying
results.description: Creatures without flying that can't be blocked except by creatures with flying or reach. See also [gives fake flying](gives-fake-flying).

results.name: falkenrath
results.description: A bloodline of vampires on Innistrad.

results.name: false hanna
results.description: The fake Hanna created by Yawgmoth to fool Gerrard.

results.name: false vraska memory
results.description: Jace gave Vraska several false memories on Ixalan.

results.name: family
results.description: Depictions of family members together.

results.name: fan axe
results.description: A polearm with a fan-shaped axe mounted on the end. In the real world such an axe has been depicted in Egyptian hieroglyphics, but no real axe of this design has ever been found.

results.name: fang
results.description: Sharp pointed teeth

results.name: fang (dragon)
results.description: Avatar Roku's dragon companion.

results.name: fateseal
results.description: The ability to 'scry' another player's library instead of your own. Variants of this ability may allow you to choose between your own library and that of another player.

results.name: faux targeting
results.description: Things that have to choose "targets", but don't actually *target*, meaning this bypasses keywords such as hexproof, protection, and shroud.

results.name: fblthp
results.description: Hailing from Ravnica, this poor little homunculus has become Totally Lost.
